channel.title: INtopBackup
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from INtopBackup, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Reporter's notebook: My Olympic Lunar New Year
item.description: An NPR reporter covering the Olympics in Milan takes us on cultural side quests, to a hospitality house and a candy store.

item.title: Baby chicks link certain sounds with shapes, just like humans do
item.description: A surprising new study shows that baby chickens react the same way that humans do when tested for something called the "bouba-kiki effect," which has ...

item.title: Michael Pollan says AI may 'think' â but it will never be conscious
item.description: "Consciousness is under siege," says author Michael Pollan. His new book, A World Appears, explores consciousness on both a personal and technological...

item.title: American Jordan Stolz speedskates to a third Olympic medal -- silver this time
item.description: U.S. speedskater Jordan Stolz had a lot of hype accompanying him in these Winter Olympic Games. He's now got two gold medals, one silver, with one eve...

item.title: The U.S. and Canada set to square off in Olympic women's ice hockey gold medal match
item.description: Canada was long the top dog of Olympic women's hockey. But with a win Thursday, the Americans could do more than earn a third gold medal â they could ...

item.title: When Rhode Island shooter started firing, bystanders jumped into action to end the carnage
Athletes to watch from Team USA at the Winter Olympics
item.description: American athletes are going for the gold at the 2026 Milano Cortina Winter Olympics. These are some of the top Team USA competitors to watch.

item.title: Team USA wins gold over Canada in women's hockey overtime thriller at Winter Games
item.description: This was the seventh gold medal match â and fifth in a row â between the two hockey powerhouses.

item.title: Snow drought helped set the stage for deadly California avalanche, leading to unstable conditions
US build-up of warships and fighter jets tracked near Iran
item.description: A second US aircraft carrier appears to be heading towards the Middle East, as Washington puts pressure on Iran.

item.title: The Yogurt Shop Murders
item.description: The brutal murders of four teenage girls has haunted Austin, Texas, for 30 years. Could new information lead to a killer? "48 Hours" correspondent Eri...

item.title: Trump says world has 10 days to see if Iran deal reached
item.description: The US is surging forces to the Middle East amid negotiations with the Islamic Republic over its nuclear programme.

item.title: Veteran dissident who refused exile released
item.description: Mikola Statkevich, who spent more than five years in prison in his native Belarus, is now recovering from a stroke at home, his wife says.

item.title: The Yogurt Shop Murders
item.description: The brutal murders of four teenage girls has haunted Austin, Texas, for 30 years. Could new information lead to a killer? "48 Hours" correspondent Eri...

item.title: Trump's Board of Peace members pledge $7bn in Gaza relief
item.description: Trump said it "looks like" Hamas will disarm, even though there are signs the group is regrouping.

item.title: US-Iran tension: Why Tehran may choose confrontation over 'surrender'
item.description: The Iranian leadership is weighing up whether resisting US demands is the best option for its survival.

item.title: Dangerous conditions delay the recovery of 8 killed in California avalanche
item.description: Authorities in California say it will be at least another day before crews can attempt to recover the bodies of eight people killed in an avalanche an...

item.title: The Yogurt Shop Murders
item.description: The murders of four teenage girls have haunted Austin, Texas, for more than 30 years. Could new information lead to a killer? "48 Hours" correspondent...
